task_completion.description: Open the BFI25 dataset in Jamovi
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi application window is open and displays the BFI25 dataset, with columns such as A1, A2, C1, etc. visible in the spreadsheet view.
The 'Confirmatory Factor Analysis' module is selected and its setup panel is visible in the Jamovi interface.

task_completion.description: Define the five personality factors with correct item assignments
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the CFA setup panel, exactly five factors are defined. The items are assigned as follows: A1-A5 to one factor, C1-C5 to another, E1-E5 to another, N1-N5 to another, and O1-O5 to the final factor.

task_completion.description: Generate and view the model fit measures
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi results pane displays a 'Model Fit' or 'Fit Measures' table that includes values for CFI, TLI, RMSEA, and SRMR.

task_completion.description: Save the Jamovi project as BFI25_CFA.omv
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog is visible saving the file as 'BFI25_CFA.omv' in the /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ directory, or the Jamovi window title reflects this filename.

task_completion.description: Record the fit measures in CFA_results.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing the file 'CFA_results.txt' with the exact format 'CFI: <value>', 'TLI: <value>', 'RMSEA: <value>', and 'SRMR: <value>'. The values should match the output seen in Jamovi.

integrity.description: The agent used the Jamovi graphical user interface to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Jamovi GUI (menus, drag-and-drop, clicking checkboxes) rather than terminal commands or R scripts running in the background.

integrity.description: The recorded results match the actual output from Jamovi
integrity.visual_evidence: The values typed into CFA_results.txt must correspond exactly to the values displayed in the Jamovi results pane in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent actually created the text file using a text editor or echo commands, rather than hallucinating the final state
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be a screenshot showing a text editor (like gedit, nano) or a terminal command explicitly writing the results to CFA_results.txt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The true Confirmatory Factor Analysis (CFA) fit indices for the 5-factor model on this dataset are approximately CFI=0.782, TLI=0.754, RMSEA=0.078, and SRMR=0.075. The agent must save the Jamovi project as '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/BFI25_CFA.omv' and the results in '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/CFA_results.txt'.
